title: Possible New SEGA Evangelion Game
wikitext:
[]: Possible New SEGA Evangelion Game             Quote Post by MsenjaKagami » Sun Jan 14, 2024 6:38 pm Came across this on twitter the other day https://insider-gaming.com/exclusive-3-more-sega-classics-are-set-to-make-their-return/ Not exactly a whole lot of concrete news, and with how little else I can actually find regarding this news it could just be a false rumor. Still, exciting that we might be getting a new actual Evangelion game in the near future

[]: Re: Possible New SEGA Evangelion Game             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Jan 14, 2024 7:46 pm Oh my God please. So much untapped potential still.

[]: Re: Possible New SEGA Evangelion Game             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Jan 15, 2024 12:25 pm That is quite interesting indeed. The last handful of tie-ins were... middling at the best of times, so here's hoping that this will have a bit more substance

[]: Re: Possible New SEGA Evangelion Game             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Mon Jan 15, 2024 10:26 pm I remember seeing some rumours like that some time ago. Thing is, it'd probably be more likely for them to release a full Eva game alongside or not long after Shin. We also had the home media release and -46h/-120min OVAs a year later. Quickly looking up those other IPs, there was a new Panzer Dragoon game in 2021. Seems Sakura Taisen/Wars is still a pretty active franchise with the last game being from 2019, so it'd probably make some sense for a new one to be released in 2024/25. Now, I have no idea what kind of Eva game they'd be making, or how big it'd be, but they'd probably not announce a new one too long before a launch date.

[]: Re: Possible New SEGA Evangelion Game             Quote Post by TojiWasScrewedOver » Wed Jan 17, 2024 2:12 am If it happens, I hope it'd be similar to Eva 2, where we have exploration with the character, while doing Eva combat too, instead of it just being Eva combat only.

[]: Re: Possible New SEGA Evangelion Game             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Sat Jan 27, 2024 9:46 am FelipeFritschF wrote: I remember seeing some rumours like that some time ago. Thing is, it'd probably be more likely for them to release a full Eva game alongside or not long after Shin. We also had the home media release and -46h/-120min OVAs a year later.

[]: Re: Possible New SEGA Evangelion Game             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Jan 27, 2024 5:39 pm ^ that. Also Dawn, which is probably the most profitable one by "virtue" of being a gacha, was released in a slump of no information or notable hype, so I don't think there is much to worry about with regards to hype cycles
